home.title: Voiceprint Search
home.subtitle: AI-powered voice identification platform. Verify speakers, search by voice, and build your voice database.
home.verify_desc: Upload two audio clips to check if they belong to the same speaker.
home.search_desc: Upload an audio clip and find the most similar voices in our database.
home.enroll_desc: Register a new speaker with an audio sample for future identification.

verify.title: 1:1 Speaker Verification
verify.subtitle: Upload two audio clips to check if they belong to the same speaker.
verify.max_total_size_exceeded: The combined size of Audio A and Audio B must be within {maxMB} MB.
verify.job_missing_result: Verification finished but no result payload was returned.
verify.job_timeout: Verification timed out while waiting for job completion.

search.title: 1:N Speaker Search
search.subtitle: Upload an audio clip to find the most similar voices in the database.

enroll.title: Enroll Speaker
enroll.subtitle: Register a new speaker with one or more audio samples.
enroll.no_speakers_yet: No speakers yet. Type a name to create one.
enroll.dup_dialog_desc: A speaker with this name already exists. Add audio to the existing speaker, or create a new one with the same name?
enroll.or_create_new: Or leave as-is to create a new speaker with the same name.

uploader.drag_drop: Drag & drop or click to browse
uploader.drag_drop_multiple: Drag & drop multiple files or click to browse

result.profile_subtitle: A timbre-based supporting view across five dimensions.
result.profile_note: This chart is a supporting signal. Final identity decisions should still follow the speaker-embedding score.
result.profile_summary_high: The two clips have very similar timbre profiles, which strengthens the result when the speaker score agrees.
result.profile_summary_medium: The two clips overlap on some timbre dimensions, so read this together with the speaker score.
result.profile_summary_low: The two clips differ noticeably in timbre profile, so treat near-threshold results more cautiously.

models.label: Embedding Model
models.requiresToken: This model requires a HuggingFace token (HF_TOKEN) to be configured on the server.

common.auto_preprocess_hint: Audio is automatically preprocessed: vocal separation, noise reduction, speech detection, and length normalisation.

preprocess.title: Processing Options
preprocess.hint: Keep vocal separation as the only manual option. The rest of preprocessing is applied automatically per task.
preprocess.separate_vocals_hint: Uses Demucs to strip music and instruments. Best for songs, and usually the slowest step.
preprocess.denoise_hint: CPU spectral denoise. Cheaper than vocal separation, but still adds latency.
preprocess.include_timings_hint: Return per-step latency so you can see the actual bottleneck.
preprocess.enable_fast_return_hint: For 1:1 verify, run a cheap pass first and stop early if the score is far from the threshold.
preprocess.locked_verify_note: Noise reduction stays on. For 1:1 verify, the request returns early when the result is already obvious.
preprocess.locked_search_note: Noise reduction stays on for search requests.
preprocess.summary_verify_fast_return: This comparison took about {seconds} seconds and returned early because the result was already clear.
preprocess.summary_verify_fast_profile: This comparison took about {seconds} seconds using the fast path without vocal separation.

admin.title: Speaker Management
admin.subtitle: View, rename, reconcile, or delete enrolled speakers.
admin.confirm_delete_asset: Delete this audio file and its voiceprint vectors?
admin.no_audio_files: This speaker has no audio files.
admin.housekeep_success: Housekeeping complete: removed {assets} DB rows, {objects} MinIO objects, and {embeddings} vectors.
